6043.title: Friday Night Dinner : Wilson
6043.description: The boys are threatened with no crumble if they don't help to assemble a wooden shelf, while Jim's dog Wilson keeps doing his 'dollops' in Mum and Dad's flowerbed.

6044.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : In My Memory Lock'd
6044.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

6045.title: Silent Witness : Life Licence
6045.description: When an ex-convict is killed in his home, the team meet a psychologist who works with murderers.

6048.title: Impossible
6048.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

6049.title: Father Brown : The Flower of the Fairway

6050.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 23
6050.description: Presenter Natasha Raskin is in the driving hot seat, joined by experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. A married couple take on best friends, each buying three items which will hopefully make them a profit at auction. Natasha also heads into Nottingham to learn about the life of William Booth, the man who created The Salvation Army.

6051.title: Bad Move : Dead Zone
6051.description: Nicky and Steve's move to their dream house in the country is rapidly turning into a nightmare because they cannot get connected to the internet.

6052.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Please Mind Your Head
6052.description: When Hyacinth and the long-suffering Richard spend their first day in their new weekend residence, it proves to be less than adequate in size. Hyacinth invites Elizabeth and Emmet round for country tea, but both this and her plans to fit in with the local way of life go terribly wrong.

6062.title: Bargain Hunt : Kedleston 18
6062.description: Eric Knowles presents from the grounds of Kedleston Hall in Derbyshire, with experts Danny Sebastian and Jonathan Pratt. Two sets of friends take on each other to buy three items that they hope will make a profit at auction. They all have their sights on a golden gavel but only one team will achieve their goal.

6069.description: When Nicky and Steve discover their kitchen has flooded, Steve thinks the source of the flooding is a natural spring and hopes it will be the answer to all their problems.

6074.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
6074.description: The four remaining sewers battle it out for a place in the semi-final. They face three challenges, none of which permit a pattern for guidance. Some play it safe to reproduce simple dresses while others take ambitious risks, but who will be rewarded?

6075.title: Casualty
6075.description: Marty's family life crashes around him as he confronts a familiar face, and Jacob realises the true extent of his feelings for Tina.

6076.title: Doctor Who : Twice Upon a Time

6077.title: Bad Move : Shut Up
6077.description: Nicky and Steve's dreams of peaceful country nights are shattered by Grizzo and his band rehearsing his latest album outdoors.

6078.title: Bad Move : Get Lost
6078.description: Nicky and Steve are alarmed to discover that an ancient public right of way runs through their garden. Grizzo is preoccupied with a new tapping craze.

6079.title: Ordinary Lies : Wendy
6079.description: Forklift driver Wendy is always up for a laugh. However, when her past catches up with her, Wendy takes drastic measures to make sure her problem goes away for good.
